# brainstorm

- User entrypoint: `brainstorm`
- Interactive capture mode: `structured_choice`

## Intent

Run collaborative game concept ideation from discovery through concept selection, loop definition, pillar alignment, feasibility framing, and approved concept persistence.

## Required inputs

- optional_theme_hint
- player_preferences
- practical_constraints

## Workflow steps

- `parse_context` — Parse optional ideation hint and load existing concept artifacts when present. (confirmation: False)
- `creative_discovery` — Gather emotional goals, player taste, and practical constraints through guided questions. (confirmation: True)
- `concept_generation` — Generate distinct concept options and capture a selected or merged direction. (confirmation: True)
- `loop_and_pillars` — Define core loops, pillars, anti-pillars, and target player motivations. (confirmation: True)
- `feasibility_alignment` — Recommend engine and scope tiers with explicit risks and MVP boundaries. (confirmation: True)
- `persist_concept` — Draft and save concept documentation only after explicit user confirmation. (confirmation: True)
- `propose_next_steps` — Output ordered downstream recommendations for setup, review, decomposition, and planning. (confirmation: False)

## Required capabilities

- read
- glob
- grep
- write
- user_prompt_capture
- structured_output

## Outputs

- chosen_concept_direction
- concept_pillars
- engine_recommendation
- concept_document_path
